block.text: You attack the Iguanodon that is blocking your way. This plant-eating dinosaur walks on two legs. It is tough and heavy-set, and its spiky 'thumbs' are good weapons. IGUANODON ARMOUR 5 SPEED Medium SXtLL9 You cannot Escape. If you defeat the Iguanodon, Turn to 137. If your robot's ARMOUR is reduced to o, turn to 306.

choice.text: . If your robot's ARMOUR is reduced to o.
